description: Retired public claims that must not reappear on public claim surfaces without explicit retraction context. Scanned by tools/check_retired_claims.py (CI gate). Published records (preprint sources, published paper pages) are immutable by owner ruling 2026-07-16 and are exempt: their corrections travel via new Zenodo versions and live-surface amendments, never in-place edits.

claims.reason: Cold-start artefact (un-warmed Qiskit first call); warmed declared-hardware baseline is 96.5x (L=4) / 33.7x (L=8) as a local regression guard, not a published claim. See docs/native_speedup_benchmark.md.

The blanket '>8σ' CHSH statement misattached the significance: the committed counts give 7.54σ for the S=2.165 pair (q0–q1) and 8.94σ for the S=2.188 pair (q2–q3). State exact per-pair significances instead. See scripts/recompute_chsh_bell_test.py.
